supported-color-schemes: light dark; } .main-container { background-color: #fff !important; padding-bottom: 20px; } .main-title { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Trebuchet MS', Roboto, Ubuntu, sans-serif; font-size: 36px; line-height: 44px; font-weight: 590; color: #000 !important; } .regular-text, .regular-text * { color: #000 !important; } [data-ogsc] .main-container { background-color: #fff !important; CMC Market Pulse:
The Essential Weekly Crypto Briefing

Welcome to this week’s CMC Market Pulse newsletter!

CMC Market Pulse delivers actionable market insights, giving you
all the key narratives and developments you need in under 5
minutes.

Let's dive into this week.

Market Overview 📈
-----------------

Bitcoin (BTC) weakness persists this week, as the Strategy
crisis worsens, falling
3.91%.
Ethereum (ETH) underperformed again, dropping
7.52%
in the same period. Total crypto market cap fell to
$2.07T,
down 4.17% from $2.16T last week.

Weekly liquidations jumped higher from the prior week as Bitcoin
fell below the $60K level, taking out $1.3B in long positions
over two days. Interestingly, funding rates have continued to
rise over the week, perhaps indicating eager traders attempting
to call an early bottom.

* Michael Saylor’s Strategy raises $1.1B through the sale of
MSTR shares, and acquires an additional 520 BTC, bringing their
total to 847,363 BTC.
* NYSE parent company, Intercontinental Exchange, and OKX
establish a joint venture to focus on infrastructure for
tokenized and digitally native financial products.
* Coinbase secures their MiCA license from Luxembourg, unlocking
access to all 27 EU states.
Markets continue to stay volatile amidst a range of
macroeconomic events and overbought conditions. While a strong
beat on Micron’s earnings this week set the stage for a stronger
equiti

75088.subject: Strategy Slides to Record Lows
75088.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

* **[Strategy](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-strc-record-low-leverage-cascade-june-2026)**['s STRC preferred slides to record lows ](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-strc-record-low-leverage-cascade-june-2026)

* **[MIM](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/abracadabra-mim-depeg-emergency-measures-2026)**[ falls 50% below peg as Abracadabra declares an emergency](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/abracadabra-mim-depeg-emergency-measures-2026)

* **[Spark, Uniswap, and Sky](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/spark-uniswap-sky-150m-usds-uniswap-v4-stablecoin-fx-layer)**[ pool $150M into shared stablecoin FX](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/spark-uniswap-sky-150m-usds-uniswap-v4-stablecoin-fx-layer)

* **[Invesco](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/invesco-files-for-tokenized-stablecoin-reserve-money-market-fund-built-on-superstate-rails)**[ files a tokenized stablecoin-reserve fund on Superstate](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/invesco-files-for-tokenized-stablecoin-reserve-money-market-fund-built-on-superstate-rails)

* **[Aave](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/aave-s-kulechov-disputes-report-says-firm-won-t-sell-aave-at-70-discount)**['s Kulechov denies 70%-discount Kraken stake sale](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/aave-s-kulechov-disputes-report-says-firm-won-t-sell-aave-at-70-discount)

**Strategy**'s [STRC preferred slid to record lows near $73](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-strc-record-low-leverage-cascade-june-2026), about **25%** below its **$100** par in two weeks, as the leverage behind the bitcoin-treasury model ran in reverse. Hours later, **Abracadabra**'s [MIM fell roughly 50% below its dollar peg](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/abracadabra-mim-depeg-emergency-measures-2026) and the protocol declared an emergency, hiking rates across every **Cauldron** and halting incentives.

**Read more below!**

———————————————————————————

##### PARTNER

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/43ea2be5-7b9b-4fd2-8fb2-d60b7019910a/image.png)
Caption: 

Nexo is a digital wealth platform offering crypto yield up to 15% and crypto-backed credit lines from 1.9%. **[Join and get 30-day access to exclusive rates](https://nexo.com/defiant2)**. Terms apply.

———————————————————————————

##### WATCH

## Bitcoin Has a Strategy Problem. The Rest of Crypto Doesn't

Thursday's clip is the thesis behind today's split, argued live. **Jeff Dorman**, CIO of **Arca**, [makes the case that the blockchain innovation layer is growing without Bitcoin](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TFlX7ltP_YQ) — stablecoins, DeFi, and real-world assets — and that owning Bitcoin now is a pure store-of-value bet. The **Strategy** unwind, in his read, only speeds that separation.

Youtube: Bitcoin Has a Strategy Problem. The Rest of Crypto Doesn't | Jeff Dorman (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TFlX

75044.subject: Pozvánka na vstup do aplikácie SBA educa
75044.body: Dobrý deň, Na základe úhrady FA za odbornú skúšku, Vám zasielame prístup na vzdelávanie do aplikácie SBAeduca. Vzdelávanie je zadarmo a ponúkame Vám ho ako možnosť prípravy na skúšku. Pre prvé prihlásenie do aplikácie kliknite na nasledujúci link https://www.sbaeduca.sk/Prihlasenie?iduser=130088&code=Gjizezcx Po prihlásení zadajte nové heslo. Nové heslo musí obsahovať minimálne 8 znakov, pričom aspoň jedno z nich musí byť číslo. Pri prvom prihlásení ešte pred vytvorením nového hesla budete 2x vyzvaný na súhlas so spracovaním osobných údajov. Po zadaní hesla už tento link nebude fungovať. Prihlasovanie potom prebieha cez stránku www.sbaeduca.sk. Prihlasovacie meno je Vaša emailová adresa a heslo je to, ktoré ste si zvolili pri prvom prihlásení. Ak heslo zabudnete, na našej stránke v časti prihlásenie je možnosť poslať si nový prihlasovací link. ––––––––––––- Ak ste už mali prístup do aplikácie a požiadali ste o nové heslo, tak Vaše staré heslo platí do zadania nového hesla. Ak nie je možné kliknúť na link, skopírujte ho do adresného riadku Vášho internetového prehliadača a stlačte ENTER. V prípade potreby kontaktujte: podpora@sbaeduca.sk ––––––––––––- Poznámka: Prosím neodpovedajte na tento e-mail. E-mail bol vygenerovaný automaticky.

75043.subject: Informácia o pridelení kurzu a aplikácii SBAeduca
75043.body: Dobrý deň, na základe úhrady zálohovej faktúry sme Vám v aplikácii SBAeduca pridelili kurz/y na vzdelávanie. Nájdete ho/ich po prihlásení na svoje užívateľské konto v časti Vzdelávanie/Moje kurzy. Prístupové údaje do aplikácie sa nezmenili. Tento email je zasielaný iba registrovaným užívateľom. Ak ste v aplikácii dlho neštudovali a medzičasom ste zabudli svoje prihlasovacie údaje stačí ísť na našu stránku www.sbaeduca.sk a v časti prihlásenie - zabudol som heslo si poslať link na nastavenie nového hesla. Váš login je: novosadovoleg@gmail.com Ak ste už mali prístup do aplikácie a požiadali ste o nové heslo, tak Vaše staré heslo platí do zadania nového hesla. S pozdravom tím podpora SBAeduca
